decision_reason: User approved both P0 A/v11 trailing-pullback candidates for full rollout. Because both candidates change the same 15m parameter, live code uses the wider approved 1.0 ATR setting; the 0.8 ATR candidate remains recorded as approved evidence within the same family.
risk_notes: This changes live A/v11 exit behavior only. It does not increase max positions, does not remove same-symbol no-stacking, and does not lower entry thresholds. Monitor A/v11 stop-loss count, trailing exits, hard-stop count, and active PnL after rollout.
